name: All Scientists, their Departments, Specialization Names and Gender
sql: SELECT s.employee_id, s.scientist_name, g.gender_name, d.department_name, sp.specialization_name FROM scientist_details s JOIN gender g ON s.gender_id = g.gender_id JOIN departments d ON s.department_id = d.department_id JOIN department_specialization sp ON s.specialization_id = sp.specialization_id

name: Scientists, the Equipment Assigned and the Assignment Date
sql: SELECT s.scientist_name, d.department_name, e.equipment_name, ea.assignment_date FROM equipment_assignment ea JOIN scientist_details s ON ea.employee_id = s.employee_id JOIN lab_equipment e ON ea.serial_number = e.serial_number JOIN departments d ON s.department_id = d.department_id ORDER BY s.scientist_name

name: All Equipment with the Supplier Details
sql: SELECT e.equipment_name, sd.supplier_name FROM lab_equipment e JOIN supplier_details sd ON e.supplier_id = sd.supplier_id

name: Materials and Supplier Name
sql: SELECT lm.material_name, sd.supplier_name FROM lab_materials lm JOIN supplier_details sd ON lm.supplier_id = sd.supplier_id

name: Scientists with their Full Profile
sql: SELECT s.employee_id, s.scientist_name, s.scientist_age, g.gender_name, d.department_name, sp.specialization_name FROM scientist_details s JOIN gender g ON s.gender_id = g.gender_id JOIN departments d ON s.department_id = d.department_id JOIN department_specialization sp ON s.specialization_id = sp.specialization_id ORDER BY d.department_name, s.scientist_name

name: Equipment in Physics Department
sql: SELECT DISTINCT e.equipment_name FROM lab_equipment e JOIN departments d ON e.department_id = d.department_id WHERE d.department_name = 'Physics'

name: Suppliers who supply both Equipment and Materials
sql: SELECT DISTINCT sd.supplier_name FROM supplier_details sd JOIN lab_equipment e ON sd.supplier_id = e.supplier_id JOIN lab_materials lm ON sd.supplier_id = lm.supplier_id

name: All Equipment Assignments
sql: SELECT ea.assignment_id, ea.assignment_date, s.scientist_name, d.department_name, e.equipment_name, e.equipment_cost FROM equipment_assignment ea JOIN scientist_details s ON ea.employee_id = s.employee_id JOIN departments d ON s.department_id = d.department_id JOIN lab_equipment e ON ea.serial_number = e.serial_number ORDER BY ea.assignment_date DESC

name: All Material Requests
sql: SELECT mr.request_id, s.scientist_name, d.department_name, lm.material_name, mr.material_quantity, mr.request_date FROM material_requests mr JOIN scientist_details s ON mr.employee_id = s.employee_id JOIN departments d ON s.department_id = d.department_id JOIN lab_materials lm ON mr.reference_number = lm.reference_number ORDER BY mr.request_date DESC

name: All Purchases Details
sql: SELECT lm.material_name, sd.supplier_name, pd.material_quantity, pd.purchase_date FROM purchase_details pd JOIN lab_materials lm ON pd.reference_number = lm.reference_number JOIN supplier_details sd ON pd.supplier_id = sd.supplier_id ORDER BY pd.purchase_date DESC

name: Departments and their Specializations
sql: SELECT d.department_name, sp.specialization_name FROM departments d JOIN department_specialization sp ON d.department_id = sp.department_id

name: Purchases and their Costs
sql: SELECT pd.purchase_id, pd.purchase_date, lm.material_name, pd.material_quantity, lm.material_cost, pd.material_quantity * lm.material_cost AS estimated_total_cost, sd.supplier_name FROM purchase_details pd JOIN lab_materials lm ON pd.reference_number = lm.reference_number JOIN supplier_details sd ON pd.supplier_id = sd.supplier_id ORDER BY pd.purchase_date DESC

name: Departments with their Scientists and Equipment
sql: SELECT d.department_name, s.scientist_name, e.equipment_name FROM departments d LEFT JOIN scientist_details s ON d.department_id = s.department_id LEFT JOIN lab_equipment e ON d.department_id = e.department_id ORDER BY d.department_name, s.scientist_name

name: Suppliers in Nairobi and what they Supply
sql: SELECT sd.supplier_name, e.equipment_name, lm.material_name FROM supplier_details sd LEFT JOIN lab_equipment e ON sd.supplier_id = e.supplier_id LEFT JOIN lab_materials lm ON sd.supplier_id = lm.supplier_id WHERE sd.supplier_location = 'Nairobi'

name: Number of Scientists per Department
sql: SELECT d.department_name, COUNT(*) AS total_scientists FROM scientist_details s JOIN departments d ON s.department_id = d.department_id GROUP BY d.department_name

name: Number of Equipment per Department
sql: SELECT d.department_name, COUNT(*) AS total_equipment FROM lab_equipment e JOIN departments d ON e.department_id = d.department_id GROUP BY d.department_name

name: Average Age of Scientists per Department
sql: SELECT d.department_name, AVG(s.scientist_age) AS avg_age FROM scientist_details s JOIN departments d ON s.department_id = d.department_id GROUP BY d.department_name

name: Count of Materials each Supplier provides
sql: SELECT sd.supplier_name, COUNT(*) AS materials_supplied FROM lab_materials lm JOIN supplier_details sd ON lm.supplier_id = sd.supplier_id GROUP BY sd.supplier_name

name: Total Cost of Equipment per Department
sql: SELECT d.department_name, SUM(e.equipment_cost) AS total_cost FROM lab_equipment e JOIN departments d ON e.department_id = d.department_id GROUP BY d.department_name

name: Number of Assignments per Scientist
sql: SELECT employee_id, COUNT(*) AS assignments FROM equipment_assignment GROUP BY employee_id

name: Most Requested Material
sql: SELECT reference_number, COUNT(*) AS total_requests FROM material_requests GROUP BY reference_number ORDER BY total_requests DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY

name: Purchases per Supplier
sql: SELECT supplier_id, COUNT(*) AS purchases FROM purchase_details GROUP BY supplier_id

name: Total Material Quantities Requested
sql: SELECT SUM(material_quantity) AS total_quantity FROM material_requests

name: Average Material Request Quantity
sql: SELECT AVG(material_quantity) AS avg_quantity FROM material_requests

name: Scientists per Gender
sql: SELECT g.gender_name, COUNT(*) FROM scientist_details s JOIN gender g ON s.gender_id = g.gender_id GROUP BY g.gender_name

name: Specializations per Department
sql: SELECT department_id, COUNT(*) AS specializations FROM department_specialization GROUP BY department_id

name: Departments with more than 5 Scientists
sql: SELECT department_id, COUNT(*) FROM scientist_details GROUP BY department_id HAVING COUNT(*) > 5

name: Suppliers Supplying more than 3 Materials
sql: SELECT supplier_id, COUNT(*) FROM lab_materials GROUP BY supplier_id HAVING COUNT(*) > 3

name: Scientists with more than 1 Equipment Assigned
sql: SELECT employee_id, COUNT(*) FROM equipment_assignment GROUP BY employee_id HAVING COUNT(*) > 1

name: Materials Requested more than 10 times
sql: SELECT reference_number, COUNT(*) FROM material_requests GROUP BY reference_number HAVING COUNT(*) > 10

name: Departments with average Age above 40
sql: SELECT department_id, AVG(scientist_age) FROM scientist_details GROUP BY department_id HAVING AVG(scientist_age) > 40

name: Suppliers with more than 2 Purchases
sql: SELECT supplier_id, COUNT(*) FROM purchase_details GROUP BY supplier_id HAVING COUNT(*) > 2

name: Equipment used more than once
sql: SELECT serial_number, COUNT(*) FROM equipment_assignment GROUP BY serial_number HAVING COUNT(*) > 1

name: Materials requested in quantities > 50
sql: SELECT reference_number, SUM(material_quantity) FROM material_requests GROUP BY reference_number HAVING SUM(material_quantity) > 50

name: Scientists with more than 2 Material Requests
sql: SELECT employee_id, COUNT(*) FROM material_requests GROUP BY employee_id HAVING COUNT(*) > 2

name: Gender groups with more than 5 Scientists
sql: SELECT gender_id, COUNT(*) FROM scientist_details GROUP BY gender_id HAVING COUNT(*) > 5

name: Suppliers who supply more than one Material
sql: SELECT supplier_id, COUNT(DISTINCT reference_number) AS total_materials_supplied FROM lab_materials GROUP BY supplier_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT reference_number) > 1

name: Scientists older than average Age
sql: SELECT * FROM scientist_details WHERE scientist_age > (SELECT AVG(scientist_age) FROM scientist_details)

name: Equipment costing more than Average Cost
sql: SELECT * FROM lab_equipment WHERE equipment_cost > (SELECT AVG(equipment_cost) FROM lab_equipment)

name: Scientists who never requested Materials
sql: SELECT * FROM scientist_details s WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM material_requests mr WHERE mr.employee_id = s.employee_id)

name: Suppliers who never supplied Materials
sql: SELECT * FROM supplier_details sd WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM lab_equipment e WHERE e.supplier_id = sd.supplier_id)

name: Most expensive Equipment
sql: SELECT * FROM lab_equipment WHERE equipment_cost = (SELECT MAX(equipment_cost) FROM lab_equipment)

name: Scientists in Department with most Scientists
sql: SELECT * FROM scientist_details WHERE department_id = (SELECT department_id FROM scientist_details GROUP BY department_id ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY)

name: Material with highest total Requests
sql: SELECT reference_number FROM material_requests GROUP BY reference_number HAVING COUNT(*) = (SELECT MAX(cnt) FROM (SELECT COUNT(*) cnt FROM material_requests GROUP BY reference_number) x)

name: Department with highest Equipment Cost
sql: SELECT department_id FROM lab_equipment GROUP BY department_id HAVING SUM(equipment_cost) = (SELECT MAX(total) FROM (SELECT SUM(equipment_cost) total FROM lab_equipment GROUP BY department_id) x)

name: Scientists with no Equipment Assigned
sql: SELECT * FROM scientist_details s WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM equipment_assignment ea WHERE ea.employee_id = s.employee_id)

name: Suppliers with Highest Purchases
sql: SELECT supplier_id FROM purchase_details GROUP BY supplier_id HAVING COUNT(*) = (SELECT MAX(cnt) FROM (SELECT COUNT(*) cnt FROM purchase_details GROUP BY supplier_id) x)

name: Specialization with most Scientists
sql: SELECT specialization_id FROM scientist_details GROUP BY specialization_id HAVING COUNT(*) = (SELECT MAX(cnt) FROM (SELECT COUNT(*) cnt FROM scientist_details GROUP BY specialization_id) x)

name: Materials never Requested
sql: SELECT * FROM lab_materials lm WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM material_requests mr WHERE mr.reference_number = lm.reference_number)
